subsection.title: System Diagram
subsection.description: - Provide Context and Container diagrams (C4 model) illustrating the overall system architecture of the project. - The Context diagram is essential; the Container diagram is optional. - Component and Code diagrams are excluded.
subsection.example:
```mermaid C4Context
title System Context Diagram for {Project Name}
Person(user, "User", "User")
System_Ext(system_ext, "System Ext", "External System") System(system, "System", "Target System")
Rel(user, system_ext, "Uses", "HTTPS") Rel(user, system, "Uses", "HTTPS") ```

subsection.title: Technology Stack
subsection.description: - List the key technologies and frameworks to be used in the MVP. - If the user is non-technical, follow the tech_stack_wizard in the section guide to help them choose. - Cover these categories as applicable: - Frontend: How users interact with the product (e.g., web framework, mobile framework) - Backend: Server-side logic and APIs (e.g., language, framework) - Database: Where data is stored (e.g., relational, document-based) - Infrastructure: Where the product runs and how it is deployed (e.g., cloud provider, CI/CD) - External Services: Third-party APIs or services (e.g., payment, email, AI/ML) - Not all categories are required — include only what is relevant to the MVP.
subsection.example: - Frontend: React (Tailwind CSS) - Backend: Node.js (Express) - Database: MongoDB - Infrastructure: AWS (EC2), GitHub Actions (CI/CD)
